definition.name: near-fixed-algebra
definition.definition: A=Im P=Ker(1-P) ⊆ B(H)_sa is the range of the spectral idempotent P=theta(2Phi-1) of an almost-idempotent positive unital Phi; a real subspace containing 1. It carries the PROJECTED Jordan product a•b:=P(a∘b) for a,b in A, where ∘ is the ambient Jordan product. Order, unit, and order-unit norm on A are inherited EXACTLY from B(H)_sa; only • is approximate. [def-near-fixed-algebra]
